model_output_solution_source: import java.util.*; public class Solution { public static long run(List<String> rows) { long hash = 1469598103934665603L; for (String row : rows) { int b, c; boolean hot; int idx = 0, len = row.length(); int startIdx = 0; while (idx < len) { char c_ = row.charAt(idx++); if (c_ == ',') { if (idx - startIdx == 1) { // empty column } else if (startIdx == 0) { // skip column 0 } else if (startIdx == 8) { // skip column 1, assuming it's always there and 8 chars or less } else if (startIdx == 16) { // skip column 2 (b), processed below } else if (startIdx == 24) { // skip column 3 (c), processed below } else if (startIdx == 32) { // column 4 (hot) hot = row.substring(startIdx, idx - 1).equals("hot"); } else { // skip other columns } startIdx = idx; } } b = Integer.parseInt(row.substring(16, 24)); c = Integer.parseInt(row.substring(24, 32)); long v = (b > 300 ? (b + c) : 0) + (hot ? 29 : 0); hash ^= (v + 1); hash *= 1099511628211L; } return hash; } }
